owl.caption: A cute round owl mascot with big friendly eyes, soft layered feathers, a small beak and little feet, perched and centered on a soft dark teal-to-forest-green gradient background, chunky readable silhouette, clean cel-shaded edges, vibrant cartoon game asset style, no text or letters.

mushroom.caption: A cheerful mushroom character with a rounded red cap and white spots, a plump cream stem, a small friendly face and little feet, centered on a soft dark teal-to-forest-green gradient background, chunky readable silhouette, clean cel-shaded edges, vibrant cartoon game asset style, no text or letters.
